interviews.note: A SHORT case with 2 living POIs = 2 interview documents. This is a MULTIPLIER — do NOT count interviews as '1 unique type = 1 document'.

SHORT.spatial_tool_note: Optional but recommended. Floor plan, city map, or location diagram.

mandatory_docs.description: First document player reads. Sets the scene: what happened, where, when. Can be any type that fits the story (memo, 911 call, newspaper, forensic report). Must hook the player immediately.
Persons of Interest sheet. Always second. Player needs to know who is involved before reading evidence.

document_selection_rules.principle: Every document must justify its existence through case value AND experience value. Never include a type just for diversity.

multiplier_types.interrogation_transcript: 1 per living POI — 2 living POIs = 2 interview documents
multiplier_types.social_posts: 1-2 per case — different platforms or threads
multiplier_types.resolution_docs: 1 per POI in envelope R — mandatory

document_selection_rules.critical_clarification: min_unique_template_types measures template VARIETY (how many different type_keys). total_docs is the ACTUAL document count the player receives. A case with 6 unique types might have 10 total documents because interviews multiply per POI and resolution docs multiply per POI.
per_document_requirements: What specific fact does this document reveal? (must be concrete, not 'reveals something')
Why this document TYPE and not another? (a lab report makes no sense in a financial fraud case)
What will the player feel after reading it? (suspense, curiosity, aha, frustration, relief)
Could this information be delivered more impactfully through a different type?
anti_patterns: Never include a forensic report if there is no physical evidence to analyze
Never include a lab report if there is no substance/material to test
Never include an entry/exit log if the location has no access control
Never include a missing person report unless someone actually disappears
Never pad with empty documents to meet doc count — reduce total_docs instead
Never interpret 'min_unique_template_types' as 'produce exactly that many documents' — it measures variety, not total count

envelope_themes.A: Scene Setup — establish crime, introduce POIs, plant initial contradictions
envelope_themes.B: Evidence & Investigation — deeper evidence, eliminate suspects, tighten the net
envelope_themes.R: Resolution — one document per POI with guilty/not-guilty reasoning + evidence refs

interviews.note: A NORMAL case with 3-4 living POIs = 3-4 interview documents. Each uses the interrogation_transcript template but with completely different content, voice, and character dynamics.

NORMAL.spatial_tool_note: REQUIRED. At least 1 geographic/spatial document: city map, floor plan, building layout, sensor diagram, or property perimeter. Players need to visualize movement and location.

mandatory_docs.description: First document player reads. Sets the scene: what happened, where, when. Can be any type that fits the story. Must hook the player immediately.
Persons of Interest sheet. Always second. Player needs to know who is involved before reading evidence.

document_selection_rules.principle: Every document must justify its existence through case value AND experience value. Never include a type just for diversity.

multiplier_types.interrogation_transcript: 1 per living POI — 3-4 living POIs = 3-4 interview documents
multiplier_types.social_posts: 3-4 per case — different platforms (Instagram, X/Twitter, Facebook, Reddit)
multiplier_types.resolution_docs: 1 per POI in envelope R — mandatory
multiplier_types.newspaper_front: 1-2 per case — one about the crime, optionally one about context (corporate scandal, local history)
multiplier_types.calls_sms_log: 1-2 per case — victim's phone + optionally a suspect's phone

document_selection_rules.critical_clarification: min_unique_template_types measures template VARIETY (how many different type_keys). total_docs is the ACTUAL document count the player receives. A NORMAL case with 10 unique types and 4 living POIs will typically have 18-20 total documents.
document_selection_rules.trojan_horse_requirement: At least 2 documents must be 'Trojan horse' evidence — they APPEAR mundane (receipt, log entry, app notification) but CONTAIN critical deductive links (alibi proof, timeline contradiction, identity reveal).
per_document_requirements: What specific fact does this document reveal?
Why this document TYPE and not another?
What will the player feel after reading it?
Could this information be delivered more impactfully through a different type?
document_selection_rules.clue_proximity_rule: If Clue A and Clue B must be connected by the player, they should appear within 3 documents of each other within the same envelope or adjacent envelopes.
anti_patterns: Never include a forensic report if there is no physical evidence to analyze
Never include a lab report if there is no substance/material to test
Never include an entry/exit log if the location has no access control
Never include a missing person report unless someone actually disappears
Never pad with empty documents to meet doc count
Never interpret 'min_unique_template_types' as 'produce exactly that many documents'

envelope_themes.A: Scene Setup — establish crime, introduce POIs, plant initial contradictions
envelope_themes.B: Contradictory Evidence — interviews reveal lies, forensics deepen mystery
envelope_themes.C: The Pivot — the document that breaks the case open, resolves main contradiction
envelope_themes.R: Resolution — one document per POI with guilty/not-guilty reasoning + evidence refs

interviews.note: A PREMIUM case with 5-7 living POIs = 5-7 interview documents, each with audio. Each interview is a 2-page standalone scene with full character dynamics.

PREMIUM.spatial_tool_note: REQUIRED. At least 1-2 geographic/spatial documents. Premium cases often benefit from both a city/neighborhood map AND an interior floor plan.

audio_scope.note: One audio per 911 call + one per living POI interview

mandatory_docs.description: First document player reads. Sets the scene. Must hook the player immediately.
Persons of Interest sheet. Always second.

document_selection_rules.principle: Every document must justify its existence through case value AND experience value. Never include a type just for diversity.

multiplier_types.interrogation_transcript: 1 per living POI — 5-7 living POIs = 5-7 interview documents with audio
multiplier_types.social_posts: 4-6 per case — multiple platforms, conspiracy threads, viral posts
multiplier_types.resolution_docs: 1 per POI in envelope R — mandatory
multiplier_types.newspaper_front: 1-3 per case — news coverage evolves as story deepens
multiplier_types.email_export: 2-4 per case — corporate email chains, personal messages

document_selection_rules.critical_clarification: min_unique_template_types measures template VARIETY. total_docs is the ACTUAL count. A PREMIUM case with 14 unique types and 7 living POIs will have 28-32 total documents.
document_selection_rules.trojan_horse_requirement: At least 3 documents must be 'Trojan horse' evidence.
per_document_requirements: What specific fact does this document reveal?
Why this document TYPE and not another?
What will the player feel after reading it?
Could this information be delivered more impactfully through a different type?
document_selection_rules.clue_proximity_rule: If Clue A and Clue B must be connected by the player, they should appear within 3 documents of each other.
anti_patterns: Never include a forensic report if there is no physical evidence to analyze
Never include a lab report if there is no substance/material to test
Never include an entry/exit log if the location has no access control
Never include a missing person report unless someone actually disappears
Never pad with empty documents to meet doc count
Never interpret 'min_unique_template_types' as 'produce exactly that many documents'

envelope_themes.A: The Scene — establish crime, introduce 6-8 POIs, plant contradictions, set institutional context
envelope_themes.B: Witness Accounts — interviews reveal lies, witnesses contradict each other
envelope_themes.C: Forensic Anchor — lab results, redacted memos, the pivot document
envelope_themes.D: Deep Analysis — digital trail, communication logs, pattern analysis
envelope_themes.R: Resolution — one document per POI with guilty/not-guilty reasoning + evidence refs
